name: qa_manager_agentic_bridge_control
desc: QA Manager agentic bridge control: start / stop / status of the polling loop that lets external agents (Cursor Cloud, CI, any MCP client) drive QA workflows against this Revit session via a Supabase queue. Requires env vars MEPBRIDGE_AGENTIC_SUPABASE_URL, MEPBRIDGE_AGENTIC_SUPABASE_KEY, MEPBRIDGE_AGENTIC_BRIDGE_SECRET. Only the allowlist of QA / error / clash / export commands can be dispatched — arbitrary execute_command is rejected.
